channel.title: GAO Legal Products
channel.description: Summaries of Comptroller General decisions and opinions.

item.title: DarkStar Intelligence, LLC
item.description: DarkStar Intelligence, LLC, of Reston, Virginia, protests the Department of the Air Force's award of a task order for intelligence support services.

item.title: Highlight Technologies, Inc.
item.description: Highlight Technologies, Inc., protests the General Services Administration's evaluation under a federal information technology procurement.

item.title: Appropriations Law Decision
item.description: Decision concerning availability of appropriations for an agency program.
